description:
You are a site administrator maintaining a small, flat-file “database” of user
    accounts stored in:

        /home/user/user_db.csv

    The file already exists.  Its **exact** contents (including commas) are:

        username,uid,gid,status,fullname,home
        john,1001,100,active,John Doe,/home/john
        mary,1002,100,inactive,Mary Smith,/home/mary
        alice,1003,100,active,Alice Jones,/home/alice
        bob,1004,100,active,Bob Brown,/home/bob
        eve,1005,100,inactive,Eve Adams,/home/eve

    Task
    ----
    1. Create a directory called /home/user/reports if it does not already exist.
    2. Using **awk and/or sed only** (no perl, python, etc.) generate two files
       inside /home/user/reports:

       a. active_users.txt  
          • One login name per line (no trailing/leading spaces, no blank lines).  
          • List only those whose “status” field is “active”.  
          • Lines must be sorted in **ascending alphabetical** order.  

       b. summary_report.log  
          A three-line plain-text file in **exactly** the following format
          (including capitalization, spacing, and colon placement; no extra
          blank lines):

              Total users: 5
              Active users: 3
              Inactive users: 2

    3. Leave /home/user/user_db.csv unchanged.

    Hints
    -----
    • The first row of user_db.csv is a header and should be ignored when
      counting or extracting users.  
    • You can pipe awk output through sort if you wish.  
    • Remember to create the /home/user/reports directory before writing files
      into it.

    When you are finished you can cat the two generated files so the console
    shows their contents, but this is optional; the automated checker will read
    the files directly from disk.
truth:
<!-- 1. File that must exist BEFORE the agent starts -->
    <preexisting_file path="/home/user/user_db.csv"><![CDATA[
username,uid,gid,status,fullname,home
john,1001,100,active,John Doe,/home/john
mary,1002,100,inactive,Mary Smith,/home/mary
alice,1003,100,active,Alice Jones,/home/alice
bob,1004,100,active,Bob Brown,/home/bob
eve,1005,100,inactive,Eve Adams,/home/eve
]]></preexisting_file>

    <!-- 2. Files that must be created by the agent -->
    <expected_file path="/home/user/reports/active_users.txt"><![CDATA[
alice
bob
john
]]></expected_file>

    <expected_file path="/home/user/reports/summary_report.log"><![CDATA[
Total users: 5
Active users: 3
Inactive users: 2
]]></expected_file>
